title: Moye Law · Presenting with Sushi Deck
summary: A neutral sample deck for the firm's Sushi Deck surface. No client matter.

slides.label: Cover
slides.title: Firm decks, *one* source of truth
slides.sub: Authored as data, served by the Sushi Deck API, themed to Moye Mondrian.

blocks.headline: Moye is a *pure consumer*
blocks.lede: The firm holds no deck database of its own — it calls the one API with a firm-scoped key.

items: Decks are *owner-scoped* — the firm only ever sees its own.
Present, scroll, or print — all from the same DeckJson.
Themed to the firm palette without hardcoding hex values.

blocks.text: Replace this sample via the admin editor, or generate a first draft from a brief.
